description: Navigate to Crater Lake, Oregon (42.9411° N, 122.1046° W). Create four placemarks at the cardinal extreme points of the caldera rim named 'North Rim Extreme', 'South Rim Extreme', 'East Rim Extreme', and 'West Rim Extreme'. Measure the north-south and east-west diameters. Organize all placemarks in a folder named 'Crater Lake Dimensions' and export to /home/ga/Documents/crater_lake_dimensions.kml.

metadata.data_source: USGS Crater Lake National Park topographic data
